title: gh-146059: Cleanup pickle fast_save_enter() test
author: vstinner
body:
Remove {"key": data}, it's not required to reproduce the bug. Simplify also deep_nested_struct(): remove the seed parameter. Fix a typo in a comment.

comments.body: Ah, the first backport is stuck because a test was failing on WASI: https://github.com/python/cpython/pull/146474. I fixed the test on WASI. I will backport this change to 3.13 once the first one is merged.

comments.author: serhiy-storchaka
comments.body: It would be nice to have tests for recursive structures, to demonstrate that that mechanism works as expected. I suspect that `fast_save_enter()`/`fast_save_leave()` are used less than needed, and they can be used more than needed (are they needed for immutable collections?)
